STABILIZATION-PHASE-26.purpose: Final local stabilization handoff for the recovery, compact UI, and session-security improvement wave.

scope.included: Verification status matrix, local evidence, live-required blockers, operator handoff, recovery references, and protected surfaces.
scope.excluded: New product features, deploy/install script edits, live cutover, secret movement, cookie-only auth migration, and production data restore.

phase-22.summary: Emergency relocation and portable backup runbooks are locally documented, but non-production restore rehearsal still requires a trusted backup bundle and isolated restore target.
phase-22.evidence: V-M-034 and V-M-035 are partial-local with live-required restore, VPN, app, and cutover evidence.

phase-23.summary: User cabinet compact mobile UI passed local build and mobile viewport smoke.
phase-23.evidence: V-M-036 and V-M-038 are pass-local for user frontend compact scope.

phase-24.summary: Admin console compact mobile UI passed local build, Chrome/CDP smoke, device confirmation guard, and excluded-surface no-diff checks.
phase-24.evidence: V-M-037 and V-M-038 are pass-local for admin frontend compact scope.

phase-25.summary: Session-security gates, rollback plan, admin refresh-token lifecycle fix, and token blacklist tests passed locally.
phase-25.evidence: V-M-039 is pass-local; V-M-027 blacklist command now selects and passes real tests.

phase-26.summary: This handoff records the final local state and operator-required follow-up gates.
phase-26.evidence: XML parse, MyGRACE index sync, local builds, security tests, and no deploy/install diff are required before commit.

operator-handoff.changed-1: Frontend user cabinet was made compact and mobile-first in Phase-23.
operator-handoff.changed-2: Frontend admin console was made compact and mobile-first in Phase-24, including confirmation-safe device actions.
operator-handoff.changed-3: Phase-25 added session-security static gates and fixed admin refresh-token persistence/cleanup.
operator-handoff.changed-4: Phase-25 added real unit coverage for token blacklist rejection and Redis-unavailable graceful degradation.
operator-handoff.changed-5: Phase-22 recovery/backup runbooks exist, but live restore rehearsal is still blocked by missing external evidence.

how-to-verify.command-4: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py -v
how-to-verify.command-5: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/current-status.xml docs/handoff/STABILIZATION-PHASE-26.xml

recovery-references.reference-2: docs/recovery/BACKUP-PHASE-22.xml: backup bundle and restore manifest contract.
recovery-references.reference-4: docs/security/SESSION-PHASE-25.xml: auth/session migration and rollback contract.

protected-surfaces.surface-1: deploy/ must remain unchanged unless the operator explicitly requests deployment-script work.
protected-surfaces.surface-2: install.sh must remain unchanged unless the operator explicitly requests installer work.
protected-surfaces.surface-3: nginx, docker-compose.yml, Dockerfiles, and server automation should not be changed as part of UI/session/handoff closure.
protected-surfaces.surface-4: Live secrets, raw .env values, admin/user tokens, private keys, and full VPN configs must not be printed into evidence.

remaining-operator-required.item-1: Phase-22 live dry-run needs a trusted backup bundle and isolated restore target.
remaining-operator-required.item-2: Phase-22 cutover readiness needs restored backend, frontend, admin, auth, billing read path, Redis, RU/DE VPN, AWG profile, and client compatibility evidence.
remaining-operator-required.item-3: Cookie-only auth migration needs explicit approval and HTTPS or production-like smoke evidence because Secure cookies are not proven by plain local HTTP.
remaining-operator-required.item-4: Any live server relocation, DNS/IP cutover, client config rotation, or secret movement must stay operator-controlled.
